alignments.candidate_evidence: Designs, specs, and directs LLM coding agents to build production systems; owns evaluation methodology, benchmarking and calibration. Eight years scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs demonstrates deep business problem-solving at scale.
alignments.job_requirement: Translate complex business problems into scalable Pigment models using AI agents, formulas, dimensions, and advanced logic

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google leading commercial operations transformation; experience translating business requirements into implementation, UAT, rollout, and adoption at scale. Track record scaling global programs and driving strategic alignment across stakeholders.
alignments.job_requirement: Own end-to-end implementation of Pigment for key customers and act as a trusted advisor, guiding customers on best practices

alignments.candidate_evidence: Positioned as Strategy and Operations leader with transformation program expertise. Experience partnering with engineering on Salesforce feature requests and owning cross-functional implementation logistics.
alignments.job_requirement: Collaborate with Customer Success, Solutions Architects, and Product teams; translate customer feedback into clear product requirements and specifications

alignments.candidate_evidence: SQL proficient (joins, GROUP BY, subqueries/CTEs, window functions); BigQuery working knowledge; advanced Excel and Sheets. Builds Looker dashboards. Eight years managing data-driven commercial operations and transformation.
alignments.job_requirement: Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with data modeling, analytics, or business logic design; proficiency with formulas, logic, and structured modeling

alignments.candidate_evidence: SQL proficient; BigQuery working knowledge. Python basic and actively learning on data-analysis/pandas track.
alignments.job_requirement: Programming (Python, SQL, or similar is a plus)

alignments.candidate_evidence: Salesforce admin with territory-budget management experience. Eight years scaling SaaS operations at Google Devices and Services. Agentic-tooling ownership implies API and system integration exposure.
alignments.job_requirement: Familiarity with SaaS platforms or planning tools, APIs, data pipelines, and system integration concepts

gaps.gap: Required engineering or computer science degree from top-tier institution; candidate background is not stated
gaps.mitigation: Candidate's eight years at Google (infrastructure-adjacent company) and agentic-tooling design/specification work may satisfy intent of technical rigor. Degree requirement may be waived by hiring team given strong hands-on technical depth in SQL, BigQuery, analytics, and AI tooling.

gaps.gap: Applied AI/ML engineering depth; Python is basic and actively learning rather than production-level
gaps.mitigation: Role emphasizes business problem-solving and implementation over production ML engineering. Candidate's agentic-tooling direction and evaluation methodology suggest applied AI judgment at scale. Python gap is manageable if core duty is not production model development.

gaps.gap: No stated FP&A, financial modeling, or business planning workflow background (nice-to-have)
gaps.mitigation: Commercial operations and global scaling experience translates to planning and process discipline. FP&A-specific domain can be acquired on the job.
Role is framed as enabling candidates to learn and deploy on Pigment; no prior platform experience stated as hard requirement.

output.level_rationale: Role requires 2–5 years in technical, client-facing, or implementation roles (L4 anchor). reports to Professional Services function with cross-functional engineering/product partnership. No management scope or title escalation evident. Company size (600+, $400M raised, Gartner Visionary) suggests established growth-stage SaaS. no director/manager-of-managers signal. Estimate L4 with moderate confidence. lack of company stage detail and ambiguity on customer scope reduce certainty.
output.summary: Strong fit for AI Deployment Strategist role. Candidate brings eight years of Commercial Operations strategy and transformation at scale—directly translatable to end-to-end Pigment implementation, customer advisory, and cross-functional product feedback. Proficient in SQL, BigQuery, advanced analytics, and agentic-tooling direction. Primary gap is stated engineering/CS degree requirement (not confirmed) and Python at basic level; both manageable if hiring team prioritizes business problem-solving and implementation ownership over production ML engineering. Advisory: apply now.
uncertainties: Candidate education background (degree type/institution) not stated; role lists engineering/CS degree from top-tier as required.
Depth of candidate's agentic-tooling ownership unclear—directs/specs vs. hands-on engineering implementation.
No explicit Pigment, FP&A, or financial-planning platform experience disclosed; onboarding timeline unknown.
Customer scope (SMB, mid-market, enterprise) not specified in JD; may affect implementation complexity fit.
